# Nanoindentation

**Summary**: A technique to measure the mechanical properties of materials at the nanoscale by indenting the surface with a tip.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alvayed|Alvayed, 2024]] used nanoindentation to determine Young's modulus and hardness of shale constituents.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Identified a dual peak distribution in nanoscale measurements for both Young's modulus (7-85 GPa) and hardness (0.3-4.9 GPa). ([[2024-alvayed|Alvayed, 2024, p. 31]])
